query:
SELECT c.name as categoria, COUNT(p.id) as produtos, c.sortOrder 
FROM categories c 
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE c.establishmentId = 210006 
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.sortOrder 
ORDER BY c.sortOrder;
